title: psychotria costularia
intro: Psychotria costularia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is also known as "costularia" or "yerba de la montaña," and it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria costularia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy in folk medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in cooking, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
